suppress.notes: False positive caused by incorrect change made seen in change history on NVD side - https://github.com/dependency-check/DependencyCheck/issues/8343
Should be fixed with jackson 2.21.5 release - see https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson/wiki/Jackson-Release-2.21.5
Kotlin 2.4.20 stable not yet released (only 2.4.20-Beta1 available). Transitive dependency from okhttp/okio via moneta-core. Low exploitability (requires local access, high privileges).
